headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .136 / .355 / .182.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the Detroit Tigers, KC 3, DET 6. Maikel Garcia led the night, 3-3 | 2B, BB, RBI in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.9 mph.

player_of_game.name: Maikel Garcia
player_of_game.reason: 3-3 | 2B, BB, RBI in the latest Royals game.
